name: ng-switch
title: Switch (Angular)
description: Binary on/off toggle built on Spartan-ng brain Switch. Use for instant-effect settings (dark mode, notifications). For form fields that need explicit "save", prefer Checkbox. Mirrors React Switch from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-switch.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
